basic_details.job_title: PMML Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Science Educator and Technician Posts
basic_details.short_information: Prime Ministers Museum and Library (PMML) Science Educator and Technician Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the PMML Science Educator and Technician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 29 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Physics, Astronomy or a related discipline; Diploma in Electronics/Instrumentation/Mechanical Engineering or Bachelor's Degree in Electronics or related discipline
qualification.details: Science Educator: Bachelor's Degree in Physics, Astronomy or a related discipline from a recognized University. Experience in a Planetarium, Science Centre, Museum or similar institution will be desirable. Technician: Diploma in Electronics/Instrumentation/Mechanical Engineering from a recognized institution or Bachelor's Degree in Electronics or related discipline. Experience in maintenance of scientific exhibits, electronic systems or similar installations will be desirable.

salary_details.details: Rs. 30,000/- per month for both Science Educator and Technician posts.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PMML Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PMML Science Educator and Technician posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the PMML Science Educator and Technician recruitment is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Science Educator and Technician posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by the Prime Ministers Museum and Library (PMML) for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Science Educator post?
faq.answer: For the Science Educator post, candidates need a Bachelor's Degree in Physics, Astronomy, or a related discipline. Experience in relevant institutions is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Technician post?
faq.answer: For the Technician post, a Diploma in Electronics/Instrumentation/Mechanical Engineering or a Bachelor's Degree in Electronics or a related discipline is required. Relevant experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Science Educator and Technician posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 29 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for the PMML recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their application via Email.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the "Important Links" section of this article.
